author: xDark_Player
text: Been using this for 3 days now, no issues at all. The route customization is insane, way better than other farm scripts I've tried.

replies.author: EclipseAdmin
replies.text: Glad you're enjoying it! v2.5 will add auto-quest support 🔥

author: FruitGrinder99
text: Does this work in Sea 3? I keep getting teleported back.

replies.author: xDark_Player
replies.text: Yeah set Sea to 3 in the config, auto doesn't always pick the right one yet.

author: NoobScripter
text: Clean code. Easy to modify for custom routes. W script 💯

author: GhostAim
text: Works on literally every game I've tested. The health bars are a nice touch.

replies.author: DM_Dev
replies.text: We're adding distance-based color gradients in the next update. Stay tuned.

author: VaultHunter
text: FPS drops a bit with 20+ players visible. Any way to optimize?

author: ProSniper
text: The smoothing is perfect. Doesn't look suspicious at all. FOV at 100 is the sweet spot.

replies.author: PhantomDev
replies.text: Thanks! We spent a lot of time tuning the smoothing curves to feel natural.

author: PetCollector
text: 2.5x is the safe zone. Tried 4x and got kicked after 5 min lol

author: MM2Trader
text: This saved me so much time during events. Auto-collects event items too.
